race.comment: Open race to close out the card. The well-related ADRANOS (3) (half to G2 winner Tiamo Grace) is an honest campaigner who has remarkably hit the top-five in all 13 starts to date and doesn't know how to put in a poor one. Rock-hard fit now fourth-up from the break and gets some weight relief with the 2kg claim. Plenty to like about his prospects. SEISMIC BOOM (10) was a touch plain last time out but go on the close-up second at Ipswich two back. Worth another chance. BOOYA BOY (7) has placed around this circuit and looks to have a bit of upside. Top-three contender. BLITZWATER (11) has placed two of three over this distance range and gets in light with the claim. In the mix. CUSTO (1) next in line.
